productionFallbackRiskAcceptance.scope: Explicit EMSI DM risk-exception use of pure Swift, pure Kotlin, and managed C# ML-KEM-768 fallbacks when an official or native platform provider is unavailable. This is not production fallback approval.
constraints: Risk-exception fallback selection requires explicit application opt-in separate from external-crypto-approved production fallback policy.
Risk-exception fallback selection must use the EMSI DM maintainer risk-acceptance gate.
Production fallback approval remains rejected unless a real named external crypto reviewer approves the specific residual risks.
Official or native platform providers remain preferred when complete and protocol-compatible.
nonClaims: No formal constant-time proof is claimed.
No external independent crypto-review acceptance is claimed.

blockers: No named reviewer acceptance is recorded for the FIPS 203 code map.
No named reviewer acceptance is recorded for side-channel residual risk; no formal constant-time claim is recorded.
No named reviewer acceptance is recorded for managed-runtime secret-lifetime residual risk.

Vera C. Ternell's 2026-06-05 external E2EE review rejected ML-KEM fallback production approval for EMSI. No later named external crypto reviewer acceptance is recorded. Internal AI review is recorded for handoff but is not external acceptance.
